message: Stop exercising immediately. Chest pain, pressure, or discomfort during activity needs urgent medical attention.
Fainting or near-fainting during or after exercise is serious. Stop and get immediate medical help.
emergencyLanguage: Call emergency services or go to emergency department.

message: If you have severe low blood glucose with confusion, inability to swallow, or loss of consciousness, this is an emergency.
emergencyLanguage: Someone should call for help and give glucagon if prescribed.

message: Warning signs in pregnancy: severe headache, vision changes, sudden swelling, chest pain, trouble breathing, decreased fetal movement, vaginal bleeding, contractions, or fluid leaking.
Your recent weight change is faster than expected. Rapid unintentional weight loss can have medical causes.
Very low intake over several days can be harmful and is not recommended without qualified professional supervision.
If you have a blood pressure reading over 180/120 with headache, chest pain, shortness of breath, or vision changes, seek urgent medical care.
Tracking patterns suggest this might be causing distress. Consider switching to our gentler calorie-hidden mode. Help is available.
